items.title: Is GEICO the Cornerstone of Berkshire Hathaway's Insurance Growth?
items.description: GEICO's cost-efficient model and steady float make it the driving force behind Berkshire Hathaway's insurance growth.

items.title: WRB Outperforms Industry, Trades at a Premium: How to Play the Stock
items.description: W.R. Berkley stock gains from higher premiums, lower claims frequency in certain lines of business, effective capital deployment, and sufficient liquidity.
